{{Quote|Very well, tell Colonel Arl he is free to deploy his fighters in a defensive screen|Captain [[Joak Drysso]]|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
'''Arl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] and a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
During the [[Bacta War]] he was in command of two wings of TIE Fighters assigned to the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
